DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative provided alternate procedures are established and used.

OperationProcedure.Para: Use flight interphone for communication with ground crew during ground handling operations. In the event of a failure of the Service Interphone system after both engines are started, marshalling signals shall be used as an alternate cockpit to ground communication procedure.
Refer to: Lido General Parts (Lido mPilot)-1. General Part—1.3 Aerodromes-1.3.2 Aerodrome Information Signs and Signals—1.3.2.3 Marshalling Signals -1.3.2.3.2 Pilot to Signalman
Position Overhead panel SERV INTPH switch ON to connect service and flight interphone systems.

Note.Para: An inoperative ground crew call horn will not annunciate loss of Forward and Aft E/E Cooling, APU fire, or Inertial Reference System operating on battery power.
